items.title: We are giving all Codex users a usage reset on the house.
items.title_zh: 我们为所有 Codex 用户提供了房屋使用重置。
items.description: We are giving all Codex users a usage reset on the house. Should be showing in your accounts in the next few hours. We have applied some mitigations, but our investigation hasn't shown users being impacted at large. We are continuing to mo…
items.description_zh: 我们为所有 Codex 用户提供了房屋使用重置。应该会在接下来的几个小时内显示在您的帐户中。我们已经采取了一些缓解措施，但我们的调查并未显示用户受到广泛影响。我们正在继续努力……

items.title: So let me get this straight: 1.
items.description: So let me get this straight: 1. We publish frontier models 2. They get distilled into cheap open source models 3. US companies adopt the same open source models because they're good enough and much cheaper 4. We start gating access to fron…
items.description_zh: 让我说清楚：1.我们发布前沿模型 2.它们被提炼成廉价的开源模型 3.美国公司采用相同的开源模型，因为它们足够好而且便宜得多 4.我们开始限制对前沿模型的访问...

items.title: From what I'm seeing, alot of the money has moved to services (with some software bundled…
items.title_zh: 据我所知，很多钱都转移到了服务上（捆绑了一些软件......
items.description: From what I'm seeing, alot of the money has moved to services (with some software bundled), not software. People want outcomes, not tools. It's feels really hard to build a pure-play software company that's more valuable to people or compa…
items.description_zh: 据我所知，大量资金已转移到服务（捆绑了一些软件），而不是软件。人们想要结果，而不是工具。建立一家对人们或公司更有价值的纯软件公司感觉真的很难……

items.title: Small things I wish Claude Code had: 1.
items.title_zh: 我希望克劳德·科德拥有的小事情：1。
items.description: Small things I wish Claude Code had: 1. Bring back ability to steer conversations while Claude is working 2. Make mobile remote control for all threads on by default 3. The shortcut keys seem only accessible if you have the sub-menu open?…
items.description_zh: 我希望克劳德代码有一些小事情： 1. 在克劳德工作时恢复引导对话的能力 2. 默认情况下对所有线程进行移动远程控制 3. 快捷键似乎只有在打开子菜单时才能访问？

items.title: Secret level 6: there’s a problem, but it’s not worth solving, so leave it alone.
items.title_zh: 秘密六级：有问题，但不值得解决，所以不要管它。
items.description: Secret level 6: there’s a problem, but it’s not worth solving, so leave it alone. This is why org with a ton of level 1s can win. They don’t get distracted by side quests https://t.co/fRGy1NC9oT
items.description_zh: 秘密六级：有问题，但不值得解决，所以不要管它。这就是为什么拥有大量 1 级的组织能够获胜。他们不会因支线任务而分心 https://t.co/fRGy1NC9oT

items.title: Agents are particularly hard-to-debug software.
items.title_zh: 代理是特别难以调试的软件。
items.description: Agents are particularly hard-to-debug software. For one, and by design, AI models behave in non-deterministic ways. Even two identical prompts don't always yield the same output. But agents are also complex distributed systems. They involv…
items.description_zh: 代理是特别难以调试的软件。其一，根据设计，人工智能模型的行为方式是不确定的。即使两个相同的提示也不总是产生相同的输出。但代理也是复杂的分布式系统。他们涉及……
